code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  let a_str = list.get(tokens, 0).ok_or("missing A")?
  let b_str = list.get(tokens, 1).ok_or("missing B")?
  let s_str = list.get(tokens, 2).ok_or("missing S")?
  let a = string.parse_int(a_str).ok_or("invalid A")?
  let b = string.parse_int(b_str).ok_or("invalid B")?
  let s = string.parse_int(s_str).ok_or("invalid S")?
  mut out = ""
  mut cur = a
  mut first = true
  while cur < b
    if first
      out = "#{cur}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{cur}"
    end
    cur = cur + s
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
